name: Shareholder
description: Party that holds shares or equity in the organization
description_fr: Partie qui détient des actions ou une participation au capital de la société
characteristics: Can be a natural person or a legal entity

name: Investor
description: Party that has provided capital to the organization
description_fr: Partie ayant apporté des capitaux à la société
characteristics: Includes VC private equity angels and debt investors

name: Director
description: Person or entity acting as a director of the organization
description_fr: Personne ou entité exerçant des fonctions de direction dans la société
characteristics: Appointed by shareholders and legally accountable

name: Board Member
description: Member of the board of directors or supervisory board
description_fr: Membre du conseil d'administration ou du conseil de surveillance
characteristics: May or may not be an executive director

name: Employee
description: Natural person employed by the organization
description_fr: Personne physique liée à la société par un contrat de travail

name: Customer
description: Party that purchases goods or services from the organization
description_fr: Partie qui achète des biens ou services auprès de la société

name: Supplier
description: Party that provides goods or services to the organization
description_fr: Partie qui fournit des biens ou services à la société

name: Partner
description: Party engaged in a formal strategic or commercial partnership
description_fr: Partie engagée dans un partenariat stratégique ou commercial formalisé

name: Regulator
description: Authority that regulates or supervises the organization
description_fr: Autorité qui réglemente ou supervise l'activité de la société

name: Other
description: Stakeholder relationship not covered by other categories
description_fr: Type de relation parties prenantes non couvert par les autres catégories
